title: Ultimate Origins Modpack
description: This is a Minecraft modpack for Fabric 1.19.2/1.20.1 with the Origins mod and 90+ additional mods. It offers over 30 unique origins, improved performance, and a whitelist-only public server. Join the discord for more information.
body:
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/503326665749823489?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord)](https://discord.lazuline.xyz "Click here to join the Discord") [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/499144?style=for-the-badge&logo=Curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/ultimate-origins-modpack "Click here to go to the CurseForge project page") [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/o7JAmVOk?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ultimate-origins-modpack/ "Click here to go to the Modrinth project page") ![Ultimate Origin's Header Image](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/UltimateOriginM/bh_header.png) ## What can you do in this modpack Description is being remade 1. Have fun with 30+ origins! (list [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vQ6OGFLtogx4bHHV6K4rOh18x0Psoo28yhHGqZAQA_m4r2Zy9qS3zUK57HojIIGaHqsnPwoU5T3WyEA/pub)) 2. Play with over 120 mods so you can have fun in Minecraft 3. Choose your class (click [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-classes) for info) 4. Have more items than in normal Minecraft 5. Have an even better nether (more info [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)) 6. Better performance (thanks to [lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) and other mods) [ ![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/UltimateOriginM/bh_1.png)](https://discord.lazuline.xyz "Click here to get invited to the discord server") **[![Click here for 25% off a minecraft server by BisectHosting. (if you use code 'Ultimate')](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/UltimateOriginM/bh_promo.png)](https://bh.lazuline.xyz "Click here for 25% off a minecraft server by BisectHosting. (if you use code 'Ultimate'). ")**
This modpack contains mods from Curseforge. If you want to download them yourself please open the spoiler below [An Origins Addon - Apocalypse](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apocalypse-origins) [Aspects | Origins Addon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aspects-origins-addon) [Better Third Person](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-third-person) [Bookshelf](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bookshelf) [Controlling](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/controlling) [Croptopia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia) [Decorative Blocks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/decorative-blocks) [Enchantment Descriptions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enchantment-descriptions) [Origins Extra Keybinds](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/origins-extra-keybinds ) [An Origins Addon - Libra](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/libra-an-origins-addon) [Lootr (Fabric)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lootr-fabric) [No Fade](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/no-fade) [Terralith](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/terralith)
Old Description

 

 

 

Join the discord server to get whitelisted (submitting a whitelist form doesn't guarantee that you will get accepted)

to get whitelisted check  📚・information or 📚・origins-info

To play on the official Minecraft server(s) or if you just want to be in a Minecraft modding community join  https://discord.gg/7uC27yjMaS

 

 

 

 

                      What can you do in this modpack

  1. Have fun with 80+ origins! (Origins List Here)
  2. Play with over 130 mods so you can have fun in Minecraft 
  3. Choose your class (click here for info)
  4. Have more items than in normal Minecraft 
  5. Have an even better nether (more info here)
  6. Better performance (thanks to lithium and other mods thanks to Fabulously Optimized) optifine is incompatible with this modpack.

 

 

 

Click the image ^^^^

or use https://discord.gg/pkAV8R29nC  (For support!)

 

We have 1000 members!


Don't repost my modpacks on any other websites without my permission.
I also do not allow anyone to reuse my modpack in any way

 

 

 

 

If you're planning on streaming or recording our Minecraft modpack, we kindly ask that you include a link to our modpack's CurseForge page in your description or an equivalent .

 

this mod pack is for Fabric 1.18.2

Java edition 

 

Thanks for reading! I hope you like my modpack.
